zh.lifeSummary: 當William Hodgson於1524年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，他的父親Thomas Hodges23歲，母親Margaret Fisher21歲。他於1541年之前與Ann Wodwall結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1585年12月12日在英國斯塔福爾豪頓享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Hodgson于1524年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，他的父亲Thomas Hodges23岁，母亲Margaret Fisher21岁。他于1541年之前与Ann Wodwall结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1585年12月12日在英国斯塔福爾豪頓享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hodgson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): from the Middle English personal name Hodge + -son.

variants.name: Hodge
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): from the Middle English personal name Hogge, a rhyming pet form of Roger . In The Canterbury Tales, Chaucer's cook, ‘highte Hogge of Ware’, is invoked ‘Now tell on, Roger …’. Since Middle English spellings of the personal name are often impossible to distinguish from the nickname Hog(ge) ‘hog’, some early examples may be variants of Hogg .

variants.name: Hodgin
meanings: shortened form of   Hodgson   with assimilation of /s/ to the preceding consonant.
perhaps from the rare Middle English personal name Hogin, a diminutive of Hodge , though this has not yet been found in northern England.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When William Hodgson was born in 1524, in Staffordshire, England, his father, Thomas Hodges, was 23 and his mother, Margaret Fisher, was 21. He married Ann Wodwall before 1541. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 12 December 1585, in Haughton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Hodgson est né en 1524, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Hodges, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret Fisher, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Ann Wodwall avant 1541. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1585, à Haughton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Hodgson 1524 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Hodges 23 und seine Mutter Margaret Fisher 21. Er hat vor 1541 Ann Wodwall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1585 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Haughton, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Hodgson è nato il nel 1524 nel Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Thomas Hodges, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Fisher, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Ann Wodwall prima del 1541. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 dicembre 1585, nel Haughton, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Hodgsonが1524年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Hodgesは23歳，母Margaret Fisherは21歳であった。1541年以前にAnn Wodwallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1585年12月12日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアハウトンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Hodgson(이)가 1524년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Hodges(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Fisher(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1541년 이전 Ann Wodwall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1585년 12월 12일 영국 스태퍼드실르 하우그h턴에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Hodgson nasceu em 1524, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Hodges, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Fisher, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Wodwall antes 1541. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1585, em Haughton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Hodgson родился в 1524 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Hodges было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Fisher, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Wodwall перед 1541 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 12 декабря 1585 г. в местности хотон, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Hodgson nació en 1524, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Hodges, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret Fisher, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Ann Wodwall antes de 1541. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de diciembre de 1585, en Haughton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
